2606.24855.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
2606.24855.paper_summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.
2606.24855.paper_summary_zh: 代理語言模型大幅擴展了 AI 的應用，但對於如何策劃訓練數據以培養廣泛能力的代理模型，公眾知之甚少。現有的開放努力，如 SWE-Smith、SERA 和 Nemotron-Terminal，通常針對單一基準，留下了如何訓練能夠在多樣化代理任務中泛化的模型的問題。OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) 項目通過一個完全開放的數據策劃流程來解決這一空白，以訓練代理模型。我們進行了 100 多個受控消融實驗，以系統性地調查流程的每個階段，從中獲得了任務來源和多樣性的重要性見解。然後，我們從我們的流程中組裝了一個包含 100K 範例的訓練集，並在此數據集上微調 Qwen3-32B，這在七個代理基準上產生了平均準確率 44.8%，並比現有最強的開放數據代理模型 (Nemotron-Terminal-32B，40.9%) 提高了 3.9 個百分點。此外，我們的訓練數據展現出強大的擴展性，在每個訓練集大小的計算受控比較中，都超越了其他開放數據集。我們在 openthoughts.ai 上公開發布我們的訓練集、數據流程、實驗數據和模型，以支持未來對代理模型訓練的開放研究。
2606.24855.author: Negin Raoof et.al.
